title: Qiryath #7153
definition:
Kirjath-arba = "city of Arba"

 1) early name of the city which after the conquest was called 'Hebron'
nasbUsage:
Definition: Kirjath-arba = "city of Arba"

 1) early name of the city which after the conquest was called 'Hebron'

    NASB:  city of the four, an older name of Hebron (2275a)
